title: Grave Scrolls
description: Adds grave scrolls that allow players to return to their most recent death locations.
body:
Grave Scrolls adds three different tiers of grave scrolls that return players to their most recent death locations.  To use each scroll, it must be right clicked for a few seconds, like drawing a bow.

There are three tiers:

![Tier 1 Scroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a02d674ee5c88541615b372efbd323f4e5e9b1e.png)

Tier 1(Most Recent Death)

![Tier 2 Scroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea6acede2e01444e95997abbc75ac0fe984b9a1.png)

Tier 2(Second Most Recent Death)

![Tier 3 Scroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3603133eb9797b721146c3a9d133774953e7b10.png)

Tier 3(Third Most Recent Death)

There is also an option in the config to disable the display or coordinates to the chat when the scroll is used, if desired.
